empty: No conversations found for this project.

drawer.title: Diagnostic
drawer.timelineLegend: tokens per turn · compactions · frictions · tool errors
drawer.tipsEmpty: Nothing to suggest — this conversation is healthy

deepAnalysis.title: Deep analysis
deepAnalysis.pitch: Run an LLM-powered narrative analysis to catch implicit frustration, context drift, and get concrete recommendations.
deepAnalysis.estimate: Likely model: {{model}} · context ~{{tokensK}}k tokens · cached after the run
deepAnalysis.runningHint: Claude is reading the conversation and drafting the report — seconds to tens of seconds depending on size.

split-sessions.title: Split into separate sessions
split-sessions.body: {{count}} compactions — the context was rebuilt from a summary multiple times, and the model loses precision each pass. Next time, start a new conversation when you switch to a different topic.

restate-after-compaction.title: Restate intent after a compaction
restate-after-compaction.body: After a compaction the model works from a summary of the conversation. If you continue, restate the goal and key constraints so it doesn't drift.

clear-before-degraded.title: Clear context before it saturates
clear-before-degraded.body: Context at {{ctxPct}}% of window — entering the zone where answer quality drops (lost in the middle). Use /clear or start a new session before that threshold.

watch-context-growth.title: Watch the context growth
watch-context-growth.body: Context at {{ctxPct}}% of window — not critical yet but degradation starts here. Watch for drift signals (answers that ignore the start of the conversation).

use-extended-cache.title: Enable the 1h extended cache
use-extended-cache.body: {{cacheMisses}} pauses > 5 min cost ~{{wastedK}}k tokens in cache rewrites. On a session this spread out, the 1h cache beta (`extended-cache-ttl-2025-04-11`) pays for itself.

keep-session-continuous.title: Keep the session continuous
keep-session-continuous.body: {{cacheMisses}} pauses > 5 min expired the cache — ~{{wastedK}}k tokens in avoidable rewrites. If you know a pause is coming, send a short message to refresh the TTL.

restate-intent-mid.title: Restate intent mid-session
restate-intent-mid.body: {{count}} frictions in the second half — likely contextual drift. When Claude feels off on a long context, pause and rephrase the goal.

frequent-corrections.title: Skill or initial context to improve
frequent-corrections.body: {{count}} corrections across the conversation. If the pattern repeats on this kind of task, a dedicated skill or richer CLAUDE.md constraints would help.

flaky-tool.title: {{tool}} is flaky
flaky-tool.body: {{errors}} errors on {{tool}}. Check permissions, environment, or add the tool to config to avoid retries.

decompose-heavy-file.title: Decompose the work on {{file}}
decompose-heavy-file.body: {{file}} was edited {{count}} times — that's trial-and-error. Plan changes up front, or break into smaller tasks with a checkpoint between each.

delegate-exploration.title: Delegate exploration to a subagent
delegate-exploration.body: Many tool calls on a large context, no subagent used. The `Agent` pattern for exploration/search protects the main context — use it for research tasks.

consider-custom-skill.title: Create a dedicated skill for this workflow
consider-custom-skill.body: {{durationMin}} min session with frictions and no skill invoked. If this kind of task recurs, a skill (via nakiros-skill-factory) standardises good practice and reduces corrections.
